prompt: Hero frame, 9:16 vertical aspect, minimalist 3D with abstract geometric shapes and a soft pastel background. A glossy saturated red (#FF4C4C) ball rolls along a dark navy (#152238) ribbon track that floats above a soft pastel pink (#FADADD) abstract city skyline. The world is sliced open in a clean orthogonal cross-section revealing three stacked underground chambers below the track: a coin vault glowing gold, a pink paint-pumping color engine, and a maze of mismatched ball wreckage. In-game HUD visible: score counter top-left, pause button top-right, coin tally. Bold white sans-serif overlay text reads 'What's UNDER the track?'. Crisp toy-diorama lighting, saturated accents, no characters, no realism. [Audio: VO (curious whisper) 'Wait... what's under the track?' / energetic competitive synth-pop at 128 BPM with rising arpeggio / ground-crack rumble at 1s, reveal whoosh at 2s, coin chime at 4s]
